description: The Cedar Block Piru is a set of the Piru gang alliance, part of the larger Bloods gang alliance, formed around 1980 in the west side of Compton, California. It gained notability for its connection to rapper The Game, who has referenced the gang in his songs. The gang was involved in the 1992 murder of Allen King and his three children. Its territory includes multiple cities across the United States.

country_links.evidence_quote: Territory: West side of Compton St.Louis, Missouri , Los Angeles, California , Newark, New Jersey , Norfolk, Virginia , Richmond, Virginia
country_links.context: The Cedar Block Piru has territory in multiple U.S. cities including St. Louis, Missouri; Los Angeles, California; Newark, New Jersey; Norfolk, Virginia; and Richmond, Virginia.
